title: Tip Calculator - Calculate Tips & Split Bills
description: Free tip calculator. Calculate tips for restaurants, split bills between friends, and find the right tip amount.
keywords: tip calculator, restaurant tip, bill splitter, gratuity calculator
intro: Calculate the tip amount and split the bill between multiple people.

faq.a: In the US, 15-20% is standard for restaurants. 15% for adequate service, 18% for good, 20%+ for excellent.

faq.q: Is tip calculated before or after tax?
faq.a: Traditionally, tips are calculated on the pre-tax amount, though many people tip on the total bill.
